untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit pattern detection (high-and-tight flag with thrust duration of 1-3 bars followed by consolidation). This requires multi-bar lookback pattern recognition and relative extreme tracking, which cannot be expressed with single-bar indicator conditions. Thresholds for 'strong thrust', 'tight consolidation', and volume confirmation are not quantified in source material. Approximation using Bollinger Bands and volume ratio provided but does not capture true flag pattern geometry.
translation_notes: Used Bollinger Bands as proxy for consolidation range (middle band) and breakout confirmation (upper/lower bands). Volume ratio >1.0 approximates elevated volume on breakout. Stop loss set at 2% below consolidation as reasonable default. Take profit at 3:1 RR ratio. Exit condition uses middle band as consolidation midpoint. True implementation would require custom pattern-matching logic for thrust/consolidation sequence.
